content.en:
Hanhai Yellow Building.

Ye Tian met with Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor.

"Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor, I took a task to find the Jade Dao Ancestor, if I find him, can I cooperate with you to kill him? I will give you a certain number of points, how about it?"

Ye Tian proposed.

"Jade Dao Ancestor!"

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor was taken aback, "Endless Dao Ancestor, I didn't expect you to take this task, I know this task, this task does have a lot of points, in fact, before you, there were other official members who took this task, but they all gave up completely, because they didn't find it." If the Nine-Story Building really wanted to find the Jade Dao Ancestor, it would naturally be easy to find it, but those really strong people didn't have the heart to care about such a small matter. And like our Hanhai Yellow Building, there is really no way to take the Jade Dao Ancestor at present, it is almost impossible to find him, Endless Dao Ancestor, you still don't waste time!"

"Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor, you don't have to worry about whether I can find it. I want to work with you, and if I do find it, I'll let you know right away. If you can't find it, you should assume that you don't have this cooperation, and this matter will not delay you anything anyway. Ye Tian said.

Gu Mountain Daozu nodded, feeling that it made sense, so he nodded in agreement.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, I agree to your cooperation, but I won't take the time to find the Jade Dao Ancestor!" Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor said.

"No problem!"

Ye Tianying said.

Subsequently, they began to negotiate the remuneration of the cooperation.

After some conversation, Ye Tian decided to give Gushan Dao Ancestor three hundred points as a reward, but only if the task could be completed.

If the task cannot be completed, no remuneration will be given.

After talking about cooperation, Gushan Dao Ancestor reminded: "Endless Dao Ancestor, you'd better not look for the real body, if there is a clone, let the clone find it, if there is no clone, then refine a clone." Like you, you're only a half-step sevenfold ancestor, refining a half-step sevenfold ancestor is very simple, even if you really fall, the price you pay is not too exaggerated. If it really falls, then it won't be worth it! After all, the Jade Dao Ancestor is the peak realm of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and his strength far surpasses you, so he can't be careless. "

"Don't worry, I'll let the clone go find the Jade Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian assured.

Subsequently.

Gushan Daozu left, and quickly forgot about this matter, and didn't care.

If it weren't for Ye Tiannai being an official member of the Yellow Building of the Nine-Story Building, how would he ignore Ye Tian!

Moreover, he also thought that it was impossible for Ye Tian to find the Jade Dao Ancestor, so many Dao Ancestors had gone to find the Jade Dao Ancestor, but they had not found it.

At present, the Nine-Story Building can determine that the Jade Dao Ancestor is at the boundary of the Hanhai District, and it is impossible to lock the specific location.

Therefore, Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor thought that Ye Tian was wasting his time.

......

In the following days, Ye Tian let his copy body go to the community boundaries one by one, and used his copy talent to explore the community boundaries and find the Jade Dao Ancestor.

Now, the Jade Dao Ancestor has been in the Hanhai District for countless years, and it is impossible to be like the original Black Silence Dao Ancestor, who has been urging a certain primordial antiquity to hide his body and remain motionless.

In that case, it will be difficult to even practice.

Therefore, the greatest possibility of the Jade Dao Ancestor is to transform into a certain identity and live in a certain community boundary.

It's just that it's too deeply hidden, and the Dao Ancestors of the Nine-Story Building Hanhai Yellow Tower can't see through it.

But anything that is hidden, under the probing of the copying talent, will reveal its original form.

Therefore, Ye Tian felt that it would not be long before he could find the existence of the Jade Dao Ancestor.

"There is no boundary in this community!"

Ye Tian went to other community boundaries again.

As for those ancient cities above the silent Black Sea, it is unlikely that there will be a trace of the Jade Dao Ancestor, after all, in that case, it will be too conspicuous.

So, he just needs to look for these community boundaries.

With the passage of time, one by one the boundaries of the community were explored by Ye Tian.

Although there are hundreds of thousands of community boundaries in the Hanhai District, the speed of Ye Tian's exploration is not very slow.

Ten community boundaries!

100 community boundaries!

Thousands of community boundaries!

10,000 community boundaries!

......

Just when Ye Tian came to the thirty-eight thousand and sixty-six community boundary, he finally made a discovery.

The boundary of the traceless community, one of the higher original domains - the Nahe original domain.

Ye Tian's copying talent instantly enveloped the entire Origin Domain, and after continuous screening, he instantly locked on a Dao Ancestor, and it was also a Sevenfold Origin Ancestor.

This Sevenfold Ancestor was hidden inside a sect, and if it weren't for Ye Tian's copying talent upgrade, he really wouldn't be able to detect it here.

By copying the talent and information of the talent probe, Ye Tian directly locked his true identity - Jade Dao Ancestor!

But.

Ye Tian didn't come to that sect, otherwise he would definitely be discovered by the other party.

Immediately, Ye Tian sent a message to Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor.

"Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor, I found the Jade Dao Ancestor, you can come over!"

Ye Tian said.

"What, Endless Dao Ancestor, you really found Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor, how long has it been?"

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor was a little unconvinced, after all, such a little time was too short for Dao Ancestor!

In such a short period of time, Ye Tian's half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor found the Jade Dao Ancestor at the peak of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor?

If the Jade Dao Ancestor was really so easy to find, would those half-step Eightfold Ancestors not be able to find it at the beginning?

However, Ye Tian repeatedly confirmed that he had found it, and Gushan Dao Ancestor still passed.

Anyway, they have a cooperation agreement, Ye Tian is sure that he has found it, he naturally has to go over, otherwise it will not offend Ye Tian.

So, soon Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor came to this traceless community realm.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, Jade Dao Ancestor is here?"

Gu Mountain Daozu asked.

"Yes, in the depths of the time and space inside that sect, with your extreme will, you can instantly penetrate the formation of that sect, and you will find out if you perceive it carefully. Of course, once you perceive it, you will attract the attention of the Jade Dao Ancestor. Therefore, it is best to arrange it first to ensure that he can't escape!" Ye Tian reminded.

"Don't worry, I exchanged a primordial artifact from the Nine-Fold Building-the Chaotian Tower, which can block time and space, and with my half-step eightfold ancestor's cultivation, suppress the void, and the Jade Dao Ancestor can't escape!" Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor said confidently.

However, there was still one thing he hadn't said, and that was that he didn't believe that there really was an Emerald Dao Ancestor here.

Still, he did!

Airplanes!

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor came to the outside of that sect and directly urged the Chaotian Tower, and then the Extreme Dao Will penetrated through the formation and explored the deep time and space inside the sect.

In an instant, the Jade Dao Ancestor who was in the depths of this sect was perceived.

"Is this guy Jade Dao Ancestor?"

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor saw the somewhat unfamiliar Jade Dao Ancestor, and said secretly.

However, he was still ready to take down the Jade Dao Ancestor first.

However, he didn't need to be recognized.

Because at this time, the Jade Dao Ancestor saw a half-step Eightfold Ancestor directly blocking the sect and then locking himself, and he directly knew that he was exposed.

So, he directly broke out with a hidden cultivation, trying to break the blockade, so that there was still a glimmer of life.
